DP.164.0000:
...
...\f
...So, you’re the latest challenger
up against the Sunyshore Gym...\f
DP.164.0001:
All right, I’ve decided!\f
If I find you to be weak, I’m going
to challenge the Pokémon League.\f
I’m all done with renovating the
Gym, so I don’t need to be here.\f
More than anything, I want to have
battles that can thrill me again.\f
DP.164.0002:
As the toughest Gym Leader in Sinnoh,
I’m going to unleash everything in\r
my arsenal on you.\f
DP.164.0003:
[0103,0000] took a look through
the binoculars.\f
DP.164.0004:
The Vista Lighthouse represents
safety and protection to us Sailors.
DP.164.0005:
I love how far away you can see with
the binoculars.\f
I’m going to go that far away with
my Pokémon one day!
